title: Filter session scanning and watching to agent-conductor project only

tasks.title: Derive the project directory name from repo root path

dod.criterion: A function exists that converts the repo root path to the Claude project dir name (e.g. /Users/yangyang/Repos/agent-conductor -> -Users-yangyang-Repos-agent-conductor)
The function is used in discoverSessionFiles() and session-watcher to scope scanning

tasks.title: Filter discoverSessionFiles() to only scan the agent-conductor project dir

dod.criterion: discoverSessionFiles() accepts a projectFilter parameter (the derived dir name)
Only sessions from the matching project dir are returned
Server bootstrap logs show significantly fewer sessions (only agent-conductor)

tasks.title: Narrow session-watcher to only watch the agent-conductor project subdir

dod.criterion: session-watcher watches only ~/.claude/projects/{agent-conductor-dir}/ instead of all projects/
File change events from other project dirs are no longer processed

tasks.title: Remove multi-repo config or scanning logic that is now dead code

dod.criterion: Any code that specifically handles multi-project grouping or sw-repo-specific logic is removed or simplified
